repo.security_posture: edge-deployed (Pi 5); mTLS to paired Android + Hub; certpin for outbound; Reticulum identity for mesh

parent_project.note: Track B of CubeOS — MeshSat Bridge. Standalone Pi gateway; peers with meshsat-android and meshsat-hub.

task.title: Compliance + polish (WCAG AAA, MLS, USMTF, FIPS)
task.prompt: FIRST: read spec/007-compliance-polish/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/compliance-polish.feature} AND meshsat/EXECUTION-PLAN.md §6. SECOND: implement per the phase plan. Primary package: internal/web/. Tests colocated.

observability._notes: Placeholder block for T-001. Replace with concrete metric names as code lands. If this task does NOT need metrics (e.g. CI/build task), replace this block with `no_observability_required: "<reason>"` instead.

family_invariants_relevant_to_this_repo.short: API containers NEVER touch host services directly — all via HAL REST
Features enable/disable based on detected hardware, not install method
Only one HAL subsystem may claim each /dev/tty* port
Schema migrations file is append-only; never edit existing entries
CLAUDE.md and .claude/ NEVER committed; spec-kit artefacts ARE committed
Parallel-dev waves use merge/<feature_id> branches + 1 MR per feature
All commits use Kyriakos Papadopoulos / ncpjfuzl@mxmx.email via -c flags
meshsat/internal/hubreporter/protocol.go MUST stay byte-identical to meshsat-hub/internal/protocol/protocol.go via ProtocolVersion field
SMAZ2 dictionary in meshsat-hub/internal/compress/ must be byte-identical to meshsat/internal/compress/dict_meshtastic.go
